A '''Rodian Sith''' of [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[One Sith]] was one of four [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] who [[Ambush on Daluuj|ambushed]] four [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]—[[Ahn Rasi Tuum]], [[Wolf Sazen]], [[Shado Vao]], and one other—on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Daluuj/Legends|Daluuj]] in [[137 ABY]]. The [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] was [[Sai cha/Legends|decapitated]] by Shado Vao at the end of the skirmish.<ref name="Legacy 2" />
